entries.definition:
ḍ-d-d opposition, adversary, to oppose; peer; to meet one’s
match; to fill up. Of this root, only ضِدّ ḍidd, occurs once in the
Qur’an.

ضِدّ ḍidd [v. n./n.] the act of opposing/opposition, opponent,
adversary (19:82) كَلَّا سَيَكْفُرُونَ بِعِبَادَتِهِمْ وَيَكُونُونَ عَلَيْهِمْ ضِدًّا no, they [the
false deities] will reject their worship and become adversaries to
them.
